word: G4689 - σπένδω - spéndō - spen'-do - Be offered

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to pour out as a drink - offering, make a libation

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Apparently a primary verb; to pour out as a libation, that is, (figuratively) to devote (one’s life or blood, as a sacrifice) (“spend”): - (be ready to) be offered.
